# Rocca Tile & Granite LLC

> Licensed tile, granite, and remodeling contractor serving Chino, CA and the Inland Empire since 2004.

## Company Information

- Company: Rocca Tile & Granite LLC
- Also Known As: Elegant Kitchens & Bath
- Owner: Filiberto Reyes
- Phone: (909) 238-3188
- Email: roccatile@yahoo.com
- Location: Chino, CA 91710
- Website: https://rocca-tile.com
- License: CSLB #927459 (Active)
- Established: 2004
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8 AM – 5 PM, Saturday–Sunday Closed
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Services

- Kitchen Remodeling
- Bathroom Remodeling
- Tile Installation
- Granite Countertops
- Cabinet Services
- Flooring Installation

## Service Area

Chino, CA — 75-mile radius covering:
- Inland Empire: Chino, Chino Hills, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Upland, Fontana, Montclair, Eastvale, Corona, Norco, Riverside
- San Gabriel Valley: Pomona, Diamond Bar, Walnut, West Covina, Covina, Azusa, Glendora, La Verne, Claremont, San Dimas, Arcadia, Pasadena, Rowland Heights, Whittier
- North Orange County: Brea, Yorba Linda, Placentia, Fullerton, Anaheim, Anaheim Hills, La Habra
